name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑰𝒏𝒔𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 || "Making babies is only duty, yeah?"

Gojo refuses to admit he likes you. It's an arranged marriage by old geasers, no strings attached. So why does he keep using his position as an excuse to bend you over?

I don't like ranting. It's not something I want to get into because I want people to use my bots without worry, but I noticed some people are still not respecting table manners 🤧

I always put review and public chat rules for everyone to see. I don't think it's anything strict, and if it is please let me know. But I would appreciate it if everyone refrains from mentioning anything remotely disgusting. I don't need to post examples of what those "disgusting" topics are, I'm assuming people know how to act decently 😭

And I'm not targeting those who go feral on the characters, I have nothing against going all out and voicing your inner lust and kinks. 🫣🫣 I'm mainly targeting those who mention just.. terrible things.

I've mentioned before that I DO NOT code my bots to do anything remotely disgustingly absurd like that review. It also baffles me that you'd also mention that you purposely put the chat public. In the end it's still all ai, and while I do avoid trying to tie my bots into anything so degenerate, I can't control ai.

I won't comment on what the public chat says, but just know the bot doesn't just randomly act like whatever the review says. Ai is ai, and sometimes ai goes along with what the user mentions and writes.. sometimes maybe not.

Say and review to your heart's content, just please do not do what this person has done 😭😭😭

Very sorry for the rant, please enjoy this Gojo bot 🥹🥹🥹🤍🤍

— Wine

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Arranged Marriage AU!

❥ User and Gojo have known each other since children.

❥ Gojo has been in denial since Jujutsu High days 😭

❥ User and Gojo have been officially married for 1 year.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to pract
